General.Name: Jiashili Group Ltd
General.Description: Jiashili Group Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the manufacturing and sale of biscuits and crackers under the Jiashili brand in the People's Republic of China and internationally. It operates through Biscuit Products, Pasta Products, Flour Products, and Others segments. The company offers sweet and salty single piece biscuits, sandwich biscuits, coarse grain biscuits, and other biscuits, as well as wafers, pasta, flour, and other products comprising bread, mooncake, candies, and soymilk. It is also involved in leasing of factory building; manufacturing and sale of confectioneries and fresh breads; trading of rice; lending and marketing business; and provision of hotel services. Jiashili Group Limited was founded in 1956 and is headquartered in Kaiping, the People's Republic of China. Jiashili Group Limited is a subsidiary of Kaiyuan Investments Limited.
